case_title: T.J. LATS LATVIS VS. RUDOLPH BUNTIC DR.

COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LATVIS, T.J. LATS
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCE BY ALL PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE ACTION IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE PARTIES HAVE AN ARBITRATION AGREEMENT IN WHICH THE PLAINTIFF WAIVED HER RIGHT TO EITHER A COURT OR JURY TRIAL. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN.
DUE TO ARBITRATION AGREEMENT, THE GRANTED DEFT'S CONTC REQUEST FOR 01/15/10, AT 10:00AM, WAS NOT PURSUED- AND BY STIPULATION, TRIAL WAS HELD ON THE ORIGINAL DATE.
